snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) ‘SWIM’ Official MV
snippet.description:
BTS 5th Album 'ARIRANG'
🎧 https://bts.lnk.to/ARIRANG


Credits:
Directed by Tanu Muiño
 
Starring: Lili Reinhart
 
An UnderWonder Content Production

Produced by Jason Baum
Executive Producers: Frank Borin & Ivanna Borin
Director of Photography: Nikita Kuzmenko
Production Designer: Helen Gadjilova
Editor: Carlos Font Clos
Casting Directors: Mary Vernieu, C.S.A. and Sydney Shircliff, C.S.A.
1st Assistant Director: Oleksii Smoliar
Movement Director: Denys Stulnikov

Wardrobe Stylist (L. Reinhart): Joana Dacheville
Stylist Assistant (L. Reinhart): Mateo Floquet
Make Up/Hair (L. Reinhart): Mariia Aleksandrova

Production Services by Twentyfour Seven 
MD / Executive Producer: Robert López, Mariana Barbosa
Executive Producer: Mariana Mota
Producer: Diego García-Valdecasas
Producer (Prep): Marla Santos
Production Manager: Pedro Louro
Production Coordinator: Patrícia Nunes
Location Manager: João Costa

Editorial Services by Cabin Edit 
Assistant Editors: Victoria Man, Chris Day
Producer: Clel Allen
Head of Production: Caylee Banz
Executive Producers: Britt Carson, Ruth Minkley
Managing Director: Kayt Hall
 
Color by Company 3 
Colorist: Tim Masick
Senior Color Producer: Colleen Valentino
Color Producer: Barbara Losseau
Associate Producer: Morgan Coyle-Howard
Color Operations Manager: Mena Smith
Color Assistants: Stephen Winterhalter, Quinn Wright, Christina Miller

Visual Effects by Tilt VFX
VFX Artists: Serhii Solodkyi, Daria Gladchenko, Pavlo Shybaiev, Maksym Solodkyi, Andriy Verenchik, Mariia Solodka, Roman Antonyuk, Zhenia Solodka

Visual Effects by Roma Onufriychuk 

Visual Effects by FOREIGN XCHANGE
Executive Producer: Gosia Herman
VFX Lead Supervisor: Przemyslaw Drosik
VFX Production Coordinator: Ania Dragun
VFX Artists: Andrey Suhoroslov, Maciek Kolesnik, Joanna Rutkowska, Natalia Rajszys, Lukasz Piatkowski, Grzegorz Zolnowski, Lukasz Linda, Michal Matuszewski

End Titles by: Ievgen Velychev

Director's Rep: Nicole O'Connell

[BIGHIT MUSIC]
“Swim” Music Produced by Tyler Spry, Leclair
(James Essien, Sean Foreman, Tyler Spry, Jamison Baken, Ryan Tedder, RM, Kirsten Allyssa Spencer, Derrick Milano, Pdogg)

Executive Producer: Seonjeong Shin, Nicole Kim
Chief Producer: “hitman” bang
Executive Creative Director: Boyoung Lee
Content Production: HaeYoon Jang, Jimin Hong, percent han, Isu You, Sungjoon Moon
Style Directing: BOYEON HUR, GANi, SOOHYUN CHO, IlWOONG LIM
A&R: Gia Lim, Daniella Kim, Yunjoo Park, Jiyoon Chung, Michelle Lee
Performance Directing: MINSEONG KIM, GIWON GOO, SEONGEUN YOON
Brand Experience & Design: Kyle Shin, HIGHENDIDOL, Anderson, TJ Kwak, Irene Lee, SOOSOOCHO, Jongmin Kim
Management Lead: Jongwook Park
Artist Management: Subin Kim, Daeseong Jeong, Jaekeun Song, Seungbyeong Lee, Jusang Lee, Jaebum In,  Hyunho Lee, Sanghyun Jin, Junhyeok Kim, Jaeuk Kim, Hanseong Lee
Hobum Song, Taehyeong Kim, Jusung Ryu, Jooho Hur
Project Management: Jaeyoung Han, Jihyeon Kim, Songhui Baek
Sabinne Cheon, Jonghyun Oh, Seungmin Lee
Business Strategy & Planning: Youkyung Lee, Jongju Kim, Hyemi Choi, Seongjun Kim, Wooseong Yee
Marketing: Katherine Bang, Woosun Choi, MinGyeong Kim, JeongYeon Kwon, Yeongju Kim, Eunhye Kim, Sejoo Choi, Inhye Hwang
Artist Contents: JEONGIN JANG, JIYEON AN, DAMIN LEE, HEEJU NAM, EUNJI PARK, GYUYEON LEE, MINHYUNG LEE, JIHONG LEE, CHUNGKI LEE, HEEYEON LEE

snippet.title: First Round: Furman vs. UConn
snippet.description: The Furman Paladins play the UConn Huskies at Xfinity Mobile Arena. UConn makes its sixth straight trip, eyeing a third title in four years. Furman makes its eighth appearance, famously upsetting Virginia in its 2023 Cinderella run.

snippet.title: CG5 × Pomni - Lover Without A Heart [Ode to CAINE] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
snippet.description:
STREAM NOW: https://cg5.lnk.to/loverwithoutaheart

Song by @CG5
Vocals by @CG5 & @LizzieRFreeman
Visuals by @CodaAnim

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS: 

Poor poor ringleader,
With the porcelain grin.
Controls a circus,
But he can’t control the kin.

So the spotlight flickers,
And the illusion breaks apart.
But this universe was broken from the start.
In the center of the ring, he says:

“I can fix this, Bubble, it’s like a puzzle.
A problem I need to solve.
I’ll pick up my mess, don’t you move a muscle,
It will be resolved.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone.
Please?"

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

Running through this server storm, 
Gotta grit your teeth while the master performs his show.
Taken through hell and back,
Disguised as a digital, colorful, delightful dome.
Gli-gli-glitches getting quicker,
Cuz tooth-face got no tick-tick-ticker.
Why does this computer need friends?
In the center of the ring, he says…

“I can put it all together, I can make it all whatever
I want, so why don’t you care?
Can’t you just play along,
Nothing ever goes wrong.
Anything can be repaired.
Please, please, don’t leave me,
I’ll make life easy,
It’s like you’ll be at home.
Mi casa, su casa,
So don’t leave me alone."

Don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
This show must go on.
Listen, don’t leave me,
Don’t leave me alone.
I said, don’t leave me.
Let’s get this show on the road.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without a heart.
He’s a lover, he’s a lover, but
He’s a lover without no heart.
A lover, a lover,
A lover-love, without a heart.

it.title: CG5 × Pomni - Lover Without A Heart [Ode to CAINE] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
it.description:
ASCOLTA ORA: https://cg5.lnk.to/loverwithoutaheart

Canzone di @CG5
Voci di @CG5 e @LizzieRFreeman
Grafica di @CodaAnim

Segui CG5 sui social:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Segui @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461 e @cg5covers107
Server Discord ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

TESTO:

Povero, povero capobanda,
Con il sorriso di porcellana.

Controlla un circo,
Ma non può controllare i suoi simili.

Così il riflettore tremola,
E l'illusione si infrange.
Ma questo universo era rotto fin dall'inizio.
Al centro della pista, dice:

"Posso aggiustarlo, Bubble, è come un puzzle.
Un problema che devo risolvere.
Ripulirò il mio disordine, tu non muovere un muscolo,
Si risolverà.
Ti prego, ti prego, non lasciarmi,
Ti renderò la vita facile,
Sarà come essere a casa tua.
Casa mia, casa tua,
Quindi non lasciarmi solo.
Ti prego?"

È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.
È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.
È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.

È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.
Un amante, un amante,
Un amante-amore, senza cuore.

Correndo attraverso questa tempesta di server,
Devi stringere i denti mentre il maestro mette in scena il suo spettacolo.
Portato dall'inferno e ritorno,
Travestito da una cupola digitale, colorata e deliziosa.
Gli-gli-glitch si fanno più veloci,
Perché faccia-denti non ha tic-tic-tic.
Perché questo computer ha bisogno di amici?
Al centro del ring, dice...

"Posso mettere tutto insieme, posso farne tutto ciò che
voglio, quindi perché non ti importa?
Non puoi semplicemente stare al gioco,
Non va mai storto niente.
Tutto si può riparare.
Per favore, per favore, non lasciarmi,
Ti renderò la vita facile,
Sarà come essere a casa.
Casa mia, casa tua,
Quindi non lasciarmi solo."

Non lasciarmi,
Non lasciarmi solo.
Ho detto, non lasciarmi.

Questo spettacolo deve continuare.

Ascolta, non lasciarmi,
Non lasciarmi sola.

Ho detto, non lasciarmi.
Facciamo partire questo spettacolo.

È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.
È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.
È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.

Un amante, un amante,
Un amore senza cuore.

È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.
È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.

È un amante, è un amante, ma
È un amante senza cuore.

Un amante, un amante,
Un amore senza cuore.

es-US.title: CG5 × Pomni - Amante sin corazón [Oda a CAINE] (La increíble animación musical del circo digital)
es-US.description:
ESCUCHA AHORA: https://cg5.lnk.to/loverwithoutaheart

Canción de @CG5
Voz de @CG5 y @LizzieRFreeman
Imágenes de @CodaAnim

Sigue a CG5 en sus redes sociales:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Sigue a @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461 y @cg5covers107
Servidor de Discord ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LETRA:

Pobre, pobre cabecilla,
con esa sonrisa de porcelana.
Controla un circo,
pero no puede controlar a la familia.

Entonces el foco parpadea,
y la ilusión se rompe.
Pero este universo estaba roto desde el principio.
En el centro de la pista, dice:

“Puedo arreglar esto, Burbuja, es como un rompecabezas.
Un problema que necesito resolver.
Recogeré mi desorden, no muevas un músculo,
se resolverá.
Por favor, por favor, no me dejes,
te haré la vida fácil,
será como si estuvieras en casa.
Mi casa, tu casa,
así que no me dejes solo.
¿Por favor?”

Es un amante, es un amante, pero
es un amante sin corazón.

Es un amante, es un amante, pero
es un amante sin corazón.

Es un amante, es un amante, pero
es un amante sin corazón.
Un amante, un amante,
Un amor de amante, sin corazón.

Corriendo a través de esta tormenta de servidores,
Tienes que apretar los dientes mientras el maestro hace su espectáculo.
Llevado al infierno y de vuelta,
Disfrazado de una cúpula digital, colorida y encantadora.
Los fallos se vuelven más rápidos,
Porque cara de dientes no tiene tictac.
¿Por qué esta computadora necesita amigos?
En el centro del ring, dice…

“Puedo juntarlo todo, puedo hacerlo como quiera,
¿Por qué no te importa?
¿No puedes simplemente seguirme el juego?
Nunca sale mal.
Todo se puede reparar.
Por favor, por favor, no me dejes,
Te haré la vida fácil,
Será como si estuvieras en casa.
Mi casa, tu casa,
Así que no me dejes solo.”

No me dejes,
No me dejes solo.
Dije, no me dejes.
Este espectáculo debe continuar.

Escucha, no me dejes,
No me dejes solo.
Dije, no me dejes.
Pongamos en marcha este espectáculo.

Es un amante, es un amante, pero
Es un amante sin corazón.
Es un amante, es un amante, pero
Es un amante sin corazón.
Es un amante, es un amante, pero
Es un amante sin corazón.
Un amante, un amante,
Un amante-amor, sin corazón.

Es un amante, es un amante, pero
Es un amante sin corazón.
Es un amante, es un amante, pero
Es un amante sin corazón.
Es un amante, es un amante, pero
Es un amante sin corazón.
Un amante, un amante,
Un amante-amor, sin corazón.

id.title: CG5 × Pomni - Kekasih Tanpa Hati [Ode untuk CAINE] (Animasi Lagu Sirkus Digital yang Menakjubkan)
id.description:
STREAM SEKARANG: https://cg5.lnk.to/loverwithoutaheart

Lagu oleh @CG5
Vokal oleh @CG5 & @LizzieRFreeman
Visual oleh @CodaAnim

Ikuti media sosial CG5:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Ikuti @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461, & @cg5covers107
Server Discord ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LIRIK:

Kasihan pemimpinnya,
Dengan senyum porselen.

Mengendalikan sirkus,
Tapi dia tidak bisa mengendalikan keluarganya.

Jadi lampu sorot berkedip,
Dan ilusi itu hancur berantakan.

Tapi alam semesta ini sudah rusak sejak awal.
Di tengah arena, dia berkata:

“Aku bisa memperbaikinya, Bubble, ini seperti teka-teki.
Masalah yang perlu kuselesaikan.
Aku akan membereskan kekacauanku, jangan kau bergerak sedikit pun,

fr-FR.title: CG5 × Pomni - Amant sans cœur [Ode à CAINE] (L'incroyable animation musicale du cirque numérique)
fr-FR.description:
ÉCOUTEZ MAINTENANT : https://cg5.lnk.to/loverwithoutaheart

Chanson de @CG5

Chant : @CG5 et @LizzieRFreeman
Visuels : @CodaAnim

Suivez CG5 sur les réseaux sociaux :

Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats

Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music

Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_

Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Suivez @cg5live105, @cg5instrumentals461 et @cg5covers107
Serveur Discord ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

PAROLES :

Pauvre petit chef,

Avec son sourire figé.

Il dirige un cirque,

mais il ne contrôle pas sa famille.

Alors le projecteur vacille,

et l'illusion se brise.

Mais cet univers était brisé dès le départ.

Au centre de la piste, il dit :

« Je peux arranger ça, Bubble, c'est comme un puzzle.

Un problème que je dois résoudre.

Je vais ranger, ne bouge pas d'un poil,

Tout sera réglé.

S'il te plaît, s'il te plaît, ne me quitte pas,

Je te faciliterai la vie,

Tu seras comme à la maison.

Mi casa, su casa,

Alors ne me laisse pas seul.

S'il te plaît ? »

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur.

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur.

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur. Un amant, un amant,

Un amour sans cœur.

Traversant cette tempête de serveurs,

Faut serrer les dents pendant que le maître fait son spectacle.

Conduit en enfer et retour,

Déguisé en dôme numérique, coloré et enchanteur.

Les bugs s'accélèrent,

Car ce visage aux dents acérées n'a plus de tic-tac.

Pourquoi cet ordinateur a-t-il besoin d'amis ?

Au centre du ring, il dit…

« Je peux tout assembler, je peux en faire tout ce que je veux,

alors pourquoi tu t'en fiches ?

Tu ne peux pas juste jouer le jeu ?

Rien ne va jamais mal.

Tout peut être réparé.

S'il te plaît, s'il te plaît, ne me quitte pas,

Je te faciliterai la vie,

C'est comme à la maison.

Ma maison, ta maison,

Alors ne me laisse pas seul. »

Ne me quitte pas,

Ne me laisse pas seul. J'ai dit : ne me quitte pas.

Le spectacle doit continuer.

Écoute, ne me quitte pas,

Ne me laisse pas seul.

J'ai dit : ne me quitte pas.

Que le spectacle commence !

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur.

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur.

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur.

Un amant, un amant,

Un amant-amour, sans cœur.

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur.

C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur. C'est un amant, c'est un amant, mais

C'est un amant sans cœur.

Un amant, un amant,

Un amant-amour, sans cœur.

Correndo por essa tempestade de servidores,

Levado ao inferno e de volta,
Disfarçado de cúpula digital, colorida e encantadora.
Gli-gli-glitches ficando mais rápidos,
Porque o rosto de dente não tem tic-tac-tic-tac.

Não me deixe,

Eu disse, não me deixe. Este show tem que continuar.

Vamos começar este show.

Ele é um amante, ele é um amante, mas

बोल:

बेचारा सरगना,
द पोर्सिलेन स्माइल के साथ।

वह सर्कस चलाता है,
पर वह अपने परिवार को नहीं संभाल सकता।

इसलिए स्पॉटलाइट टिमटिमाती है,
और भ्रम टूट जाता है।

लेकिन यह ब्रह्मांड शुरू से ही टूटा हुआ था।
रिंग के बीच में, वह कहता है:

“मैं इसे ठीक कर सकता हूँ, बबल, यह एक पहेली की तरह है।
एक समस्या जिसे मुझे हल करना है।
मैं अपनी सारी गड़बड़ समेट लूँगा, तुम हिलना मत,
यह सुलझ जाएगा।
कृपया, कृपया, मुझे मत छोड़ो,
मैं जीवन आसान बना दूँगा,
ऐसा लगेगा जैसे तुम घर पर हो।
मेरा घर, तुम्हारा घर,
इसलिए मुझे अकेला मत छोड़ो।
कृपया?”

वह एक प्रेमी है, वह एक प्रेमी है, लेकिन
वह बिना दिल का प्रेमी है।
वह एक प्रेमी है, वह एक प्रेमी है, लेकिन
वह बिना दिल का प्रेमी है।

वह एक प्रेमी है, वह एक प्रेमी है, लेकिन
वह बिना दिल का प्रेमी है।

एक प्रेमी, एक प्रेमी,
एक ऐसा प्रेमी-प्रेम, जिसमें दिल नहीं है।

इस सर्वर के तूफान से गुज़रते हुए,
मास्टर के करतब देखते हुए दांत भींचने पड़ते हैं।
नरक से गुज़रकर वापस आया,
एक डिजिटल, रंगीन, मनमोहक गुंबद के रूप में।
गड़बड़ियां तेज़ होती जा रही हैं,
क्योंकि दांत वाले चेहरे में टिक-टिक-टिकर नहीं है।
इस कंप्यूटर को दोस्तों की क्या ज़रूरत है?
अखाड़े के बीच में, वह कहता है…

“मैं सब कुछ जोड़ सकता हूँ, मैं सब कुछ अपनी मर्ज़ी से बना सकता हूँ,
तो तुम्हें परवाह क्यों नहीं?
क्या तुम बस साथ नहीं दे सकते?
कुछ भी कभी गलत नहीं होता।
सब कुछ ठीक किया जा सकता है।
कृपया, कृपया, मुझे मत छोड़ो,
मैं ज़िंदगी आसान बना दूँगा,
ऐसा लगेगा जैसे तुम घर पर हो।
मेरा घर, तुम्हारा घर,
तो मुझे अकेला मत छोड़ो।”

मुझे मत छोड़ो,
मुझे अकेला मत छोड़ो।

मैंने कहा, मुझे छोड़कर मत जाओ।
यह शो चलता रहना चाहिए।
सुनो, मुझे छोड़कर मत जाओ,

चलो इस शो को शुरू करते हैं।

वह प्रेमी है, वह प्रेमी है, लेकिन

वह प्रेमी है, वह प्रेमी है, लेकिन

Discord-Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

TEXT:

Armer, armer Zirkusdirektor,
mit dem Porzellanlächeln.
Er leitet einen Zirkus,
aber er kann seine Familie nicht kontrollieren.

Der Scheinwerfer flackert,
und die Illusion zerbricht.
Doch dieses Universum war von Anfang an kaputt.
Im Zentrum des Rings sagt er:

„Ich kann das reparieren, Bubble, es ist wie ein Puzzle.
Ein Problem, das ich lösen muss.
Ich räume meinen Kram weg, rühr dich nicht,
es wird sich alles regeln.
Bitte, bitte, verlass mich nicht,
ich mache dir das Leben leicht,
es wird sein, als wärst du zu Hause.
Mi casa, su casa,
also lass mich nicht allein.
Bitte?“

Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber
er ist ein Liebender ohne Herz.
Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber
er ist ein Liebender ohne Herz.

Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber
er ist ein Liebender ohne Herz.

Ein Liebhaber, ein Liebhaber,
Ein Liebhaber-Liebe, ohne Herz.

Durch diesen Serversturm rennend,
Musst du die Zähne zusammenbeißen, während der Meister seine Show abliefert.
Durch die Hölle und zurück geführt,
Verkleidet als digitale, farbenfrohe, entzückende Kuppel.
Gli-gli-Glitches werden immer schneller,
Denn Zahngesicht hat keinen tickenden Takt.
Warum braucht dieser Computer Freunde?
In der Mitte des Rings sagt er…

„Ich kann alles zusammensetzen, ich kann alles so gestalten, wie ich will, also warum ist es dir egal?
Kannst du nicht einfach mitspielen?
Es geht nie etwas schief.
Alles kann repariert werden.
Bitte, bitte, verlass mich nicht,
Ich werde dir das Leben leicht machen,
Es ist, als wärst du zu Hause.
Mi casa, su casa,
Also verlass mich nicht allein.“

Verlass mich nicht,
Verlass mich nicht allein.

Ich sagte, verlass mich nicht.
Die Show muss weitergehen.
Hör zu, verlass mich nicht,
lass mich nicht allein.
Ich sagte, verlass mich nicht.
Lasst uns die Show starten.

Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber
Er ist ein Liebender ohne Herz.
Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber
Er ist ein Liebender ohne Herz.
Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber
Er ist ein Liebender ohne Herz.

Ein Liebender ohne Herz.

Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber

Er ist ein Liebender, er ist ein Liebender, aber

snippet.title: Minecraft LIVE - March 2026
snippet.description:
New game drops! Developers! More!

It’s time for Minecraft LIVE again! Kick things off with a fun-packed community pre-show, get the scoop on upcoming game drops from our developers, go behind the scenes, meet awesome guests, and discover exciting stuff to come. After the broadcast, stay tuned in for the Deep Dig After Show where our developers and guests show off the new features, often resulting in chaos.

Tune in on March 21 at 10am PT!

ja.title: [日本語] Minecraft LIVE 2026 年 3 月
ja.description:
新作ゲーム発表！開発者からの情報！その他盛りだくさん！

Minecraft LIVE が再び帰ってきます！コミュニティ向けのお楽しみ満載のプレショーで始まり、開発者による新作ゲームの最新情報や、製作の裏話に迫るほか、ゲスト陣も登場します。さらに、今後のエキサイティングなお知らせも。配信後は、Deep Dig After Showもお見逃しなく。開発者とゲストが新しい機能を紹介しますが、思いがけないことがしばしば起こります。

配信は 3 月 22 日午前 2 時 (日本時間)から！

詳しくは、Minecraft.net をご確認ください！
https://www.minecraft.net/"

zh-Hans.title: [简体中文] Minecraft LIVE - 2026 年 3 月
zh-Hans.description:
新游戏掉落物！开发者节目！更多精彩！

又到了 Minecraft LIVE 时间! 活动将以趣味纷呈的社区展会预热节目为开启；获取由我们的开发者将带来的新游戏更新资讯；走进幕后，结识出色的嘉宾，探索更多即将呈现的精彩内容。直播结束后请继续锁定 Deep Dig After Show，我们的开发者和特邀嘉宾将现场演示新功能，失控欢乐，狂欢来袭。

太平洋时间 3 月 21 日上午 10 点，敬请关注！

请访问 Minecraft.net 获取更多信息！
https://www.minecraft.net/

nl.title: [Nederlands] Minecraft LIVE - maart 2026
nl.description:
Lancering van een nieuwe game! Ontwikkelaars! Meer!

Het is weer tijd voor Minecraft LIVE! Start met een pre-show boordevol fun voor de community, kom als eerste alles te weten over aankomende games van onze ontwikkelaars, neem een kijkje achter de schermen, maak kennis met geweldige gasten en ontdek wat er allemaal nog meer gaat gebeuren. Blijf na de uitzending kijken naar de Deep Dig After Show, waarin onze ontwikkelaars en gasten de nieuwe functies demonstreren, wat vaak tot chaos leidt.

Zorg dat je klaarzit op 21 maart om 18:00 uur!

Ga naar Minecraft.net voor meer informatie!
https://www.minecraft.net/

fr-CA.title: [Français - CA] Minecraft LIVE – Mars 2026
fr-CA.description:
Nouveaux jeux disponibles! Développeurs! Plus!

Minecraft LIVE est de retour! Commencez par le pré-show communautaire tout en plaisir! Laissez nos développeurs vous annoncer en primeur les prochaines sorties de jeux, découvrez les coulisses du développement, rencontrez des invités extras et soyez informé des nouveautés passionnantes qui sont à venir. Après la diffusion, restez à l’écoute du Deep Dig After Show, une émission bien souvent chaotique, où nos développeurs et invités présentent les nouvelles fonctionnalités.

Connectez-vous le 21 mars à 13 h (heure de l’Est)!

Visitez Minecraft.net pour plus d’informations!
https://www.minecraft.net/

pt-BR.title: Minecraft AO VIVO - Março de 2026
pt-BR.description:
Novidades no jogo! Desenvolvedores! E muito mais!

Chegou a hora do Minecraft LIVE de novo! Comece com um pré-show cheio de diversão para a comunidade, fique por dentro das novidades do jogo direto dos nossos desenvolvedores, veja os bastidores, conheça convidados incríveis e descubra as novidades que estão por vir. Depois da transmissão, não perca o Deep Dig After Show, onde nossos desenvolvedores e convidados mostram os novos recursos, muitas vezes resultando em caos.

Sintonize dia 21 de março às 10h (horário do Pacífico)!

Língua de Sinais Americana: https://youtube.com/live/-uQFmnbPZPo
Língua de Sinais Britânica: https://youtube.com/live/bj_Z0XAsuvE

https://www.minecraft.net/

iw.title: [עברית] Minecraft Live – מרץ 2026
iw.description:
משחקים חדשים שעומדים לצאת! מפתחים! עוד!

הגיע שוב הזמן ל-Minecraft LIVE! תוכלו להתחיל עם Pre-Show קהילתית ועמוסה בכיף, ואז לקבל מהמפתחים שלנו את כל המידע על משחקים חדשים שעומדים לצאת, להיכנס מאחורי הקלעים, לפגוש אורחים מעולים ולגלות את כל הדברים המרגשים שעוד מתוכננים לבוא. לאחר השידור, תוכלו לצפות גם ב-After Show של ה-Deep Dig, שבה המפתחים והאורחים שלנו מדגימים את הפיצ'רים החדשים הללו, כשאתם נהנים מכל הכאוס שמתפרץ על המסך.

הצטרפו לכיף ב-21 במרץ בשעה 7 בערב שעון ישראל!

תוכלו למצוא מידע נוסף ב-Minecraft.net!
https://www.minecraft.net/"

ko.title: [한국어] Minecraft LIVE - 2026년 3월
ko.description:
새로운 게임 출시! 개발자! 관련자!

Minecraft LIVE가 돌아옵니다! 재미로 가득한 커뮤니티 프리쇼로 게임을 시작해 보세요. 개발자들이 전하는 곧 출시될 게임 소식을 듣고, 비하인드 스토리를 살펴보며, 멋진 게스트들을 만나고, 앞으로 공개될 흥미로운 콘텐츠도 미리 확인할 수 있습니다. 방송 후에 이어지는 Deep Dig  After Show에서는 개발자와 게스트들이 새 기능에 대해 소개하며 때로 예측 불가능한 소동이 벌어지기도 합니다.

3월 22일 오전 2시(한국표준시)에 시청하세요!

Minecraft.net에서 자세히 알아보세요!
https://www.minecraft.net/

Após a transmissão, fique ligado no Deep Dig After Show, onde os nossos desenvolvedores e convidados mostram os novos recursos, que muitas vezes resultam em caos.

Lad os skyde det i gang med et sjovt og indholdsrigt community-pre-show, få de seneste oplysninger om kommende udgivelser fra vores udviklere, kom med bag kulisserne, mød fantastiske gæster og opdag spændende ting, der er på vej. Nach der Sendung erwartet euch die „Deep Dig After Show“, in der unsere Entwickler und Gäste die neuen Features präsentieren – und dabei oft für etwas Chaos sorgen.

Ξεκινήστε με ένα pre-show γεμάτο διασκέδαση για την κοινότητα, μάθετε τα νέα για τις επερχόμενες κυκλοφορίες από τους δημιουργούς μας, ρίξτε μια ματιά στα παρασκήνια, γνωρίστε εκλεκτούς καλεσμένους και ανακαλύψτε όλα όσα έρχονται. Μετά την εκπομπή, παραμείνετε συντονισμένοι για το Deep Dig After Show όπου οι προγραμματιστές και οι καλεσμένοι μας παρουσιάζουν τα νέα χαρακτηριστικά, το οποίο συχνά οδηγεί σε ένα χάος.

Nouveautés ! Développeurs ! Et plus encore !

ar.description:
تحديثات وإضافات جديدة قادمة إلى اللعبة! المطورون! المزيد!

لقد حان وقت Minecraft LIVE من جديد! انطلقوا في رحلة الحدث بعرض افتتاحي مفعم بالحيوية رفقة مجتمعنا، وتعرفوا مباشرةً من مطوّرينا على آخر المستجدات حول الإصدارات القادمة، وانغمسوا في كواليس اللعبة، والتقوا بضيوف استثنائيين، وترقّبوا مفاجآت حصرية لا تُفوَّت! لا تفوّتوا برنامج Deep Dig After Show بعد البث المباشر، حيث يكشف المطوّرون وضيوفهم عن الميزات الجديدة وسط أجواء مليئة بالمفاجآت والفوضى المرحة!

ru.title: [русский] Minecraft LIVE - март 2026
ru.description:
Информация о новых игровых релизах, сведения от разработчиков и многое другое!

И еще раз пришло время Minecraft LIVE! Мы начнем с веселого разогревочного шоу, после чего вы получите свежие новости о будущих релизах игр от наших разработчиков, заглянете за кулисы, познакомитесь с нашими замечательными гостями и узнаете о том, что интересного ждет впереди. После трансляции оставайтесь с нами — вас ждет афтер-шоу Deep Dig, где разработчики и гости демонстрируют новинки, что нередко заканчивается полным хаосом.

Присоединяйтесь 21 марта в 20:00 по московскому времени!

Больше информации на Minecraft.net!
https://www.minecraft.net/

cs.title: [Čeština] Minecraft Live - březen 2026

Po vysílání zůstaňte naladění na Deep Dig After Show, kde naši vývojáři a hosté předvedou nové funkce, což často způsobuje chaos.

Інформація про нові ігрові релізи, відомості від розробників тощо!

Знову настав час для Minecraft LIVE! Почніть із яскравого передшоу для спільноти: дізнайтеся першими про майбутні релізи ігор від наших розробників, зазирніть за лаштунки, познайомтеся із захопливими гостями й відкрийте для себе цікавинки, що з’являться в майбутньому. Після трансляції на вас чекатиме шоу Deep Dig After Show, під час якого розробники й гості демонструватимуть нові функції, що часто перетворюється на повний хаос.

id.title: Minecraft LIVE - Maret 2026

Setelah siaran, tetap ikuti Deep Dig After Show di mana para pengembang dan tamu kami akan memamerkan fitur-fitur baru, yang seringkali berujung pada kekacauan.

it.title: Minecraft LIVE - Marzo 2026
it.description:
Nuovi giochi in arrivo! Sviluppatori! E molto altro!

È di nuovo tempo di Minecraft LIVE! Iniziamo con un divertente pre-show per la community, scoprite in anteprima i prossimi giochi direttamente dai nostri sviluppatori, andate dietro le quinte, incontrate ospiti fantastici e scoprite le novità in arrivo. Dopo la trasmissione, rimanete sintonizzati per il Deep Dig After Show, dove i nostri sviluppatori e ospiti mostreranno le nuove funzionalità, spesso con risultati caotici.

Sintonizzatevi il 21 marzo alle 10:00 PT!

Lingua dei segni americana: https://youtube.com/live/-uQFmnbPZPo
Lingua dei segni britannica: https://youtube.com/live/bj_Z0XAsuvE
Descrizioni audio: https://youtube.com/live/Buh2UiDT7kM

Visitate Minecraft.net per maggiori informazioni!

https://www.minecraft.net/

fa.title: [فارسی] Minecraft LIVE - مارس 2026
fa.description:
به‌روزرسانی‌های جدید بازی! توسعه‌دهندگان! چیزهای بیشتر!

وقت Minecraft LIVE دوباره فرا رسیده است! با یک پیش‌نمایش اجتماعی پر از سرگرمی شروع کنید، از توسعه‌دهندگان ما درباره‌ عرضه‌های آینده‌ بازی‌ها اطلاعات بگیرید، نگاهی پشت‌صحنه داشته باشید، با مهمانان فوق‌العاده آشنا شوید و چیزهای هیجان‌انگیزی را که در راه هستند کشف کنید. بعد از پخش، همراه ما برای تماشای Deep Dig After Show بمانید؛ جایی که توسعه‌دهندگان و مهمانان‌مان ویژگی‌های جدید را نمایش می‌دهند؛ که اغلب به هرج‌ومرج می‌انجامد.

در 21 مارس، ساعت 8:30 بعدازظهر به وقت ایران همراه ما باشید!

برای اطلاعات بیشتر به Minecraft.net سر بزنید!
https://www.minecraft.net/

fi.title: [Suomi] Minecraft LIVE - maaliskuu 2026
fi.description:
Uuden pelin julkaisu! Kehittäjiä! Paljon muuta!

Minecraft LIVE on taas täällä! Aloita huippuhauskoilla etkoilla, kuule kehittäjiltämme tulevista pelijulkaisuista, kurkkaa kulissien taakse, tutustu mahtaviin vieraisiin ja kuule, mitä jännää on tulossa. Lähetyksen jälkeen voit jäädä seuraamaan Deep Dig After Show -tapahtumaa, jossa kehittäjät ja vieraat kokeilevat uusia ominaisuuksia usein kaoottisin seurauksin. 

Tulossa 21. maaliskuuta klo 19.00 EET!

Katso lisätietoa osoitteesta Minecraft.net!
https://www.minecraft.net/

es-419.title: [Español - MX] Minecraft LIVE - Marzo 2026
es-419.description:
¡Nuevo juego disponible! ¡Desarrolladores! ¡Y más!

¡Ya llega otra edición de Minecraft LIVE! Empieza el evento con un divertidísimo espectáculo previo en comunidad, entérate de las últimas novedades sobre los próximos lanzamientos de nuestros desarrolladores, echa un vistazo detrás de las cámaras, conoce a invitados increíbles y descubre todas las sorpresas que te esperan. Después de la emisión, no te pierdas el After Show Deep Dig, donde nuestros desarrolladores e invitados muestran las nuevas funciones, a menudo con resultados caóticos.

¡No te lo pierdas el 21 de marzo a las 11:00 a. m. (hora del Centro)!

¡Echa un vistazo a Minecraft.net para obtener más información!
https://www.minecraft.net/

hi.title: Minecraft LIVE - मार्च 2026
hi.description:
नए गेम लॉन्च! डेवलपर्स! और भी बहुत कुछ!

एक बार फिर Minecraft LIVE का समय आ गया है! एक मज़ेदार कम्युनिटी प्री-शो के साथ शुरुआत करें, हमारे डेवलपर्स से आने वाले गेम लॉन्च के बारे में जानकारी पाएं, पर्दे के पीछे की बातें जानें, शानदार मेहमानों से मिलें और आने वाली रोमांचक चीज़ों के बारे में जानें। प्रसारण के बाद, डीप डिग आफ्टर शो के लिए बने रहें, जहां हमारे डेवलपर्स और मेहमान नए फीचर्स दिखाएंगे, जिससे अक्सर अफरा-तफरी मच जाती है।

21 मार्च को सुबह 10 बजे PT पर देखना न भूलें!

अमेरिकन साइन लैंग्वेज: https://youtube.com/live/-uQFmnbPZPo
ब्रिटिश साइन लैंग्वेज: https://youtube.com/live/bj_Z0XAsuvE
ऑडियो विवरण: https://youtube.com/live/Buh2UiDT7kM

अधिक जानकारी के लिए Minecraft.net देखें!

https://www.minecraft.net/

es-ES.title: [Español (España)] Minecraft LIVE - Marzo de 2026
es-ES.description:
¡Nuevas actualizaciones! ¡Desarrolladores! ¡Y mucho más!

¡Vuelve Minecraft LIVE! Comienza con una previa divertida para la comunidad, descubre en primicia los próximos lanzamientos de nuestros desarrolladores, adéntrate entre bastidores, conoce a invitados increíbles y descubre todas las cosas emocionantes que están por venir. Después de la retransmisión, no te pierdas The Deep Dig After Show, un programa especial en el que nuestros desarrolladores y algunos invitados ponen a prueba las nuevas funciones, casi siempre con resultados caóticos.

No te pierdas la retransmisión el 21 de marzo a las 18:00 h CET.

¡Visita Minecraft.net para obtener más información!
https://www.minecraft.net/

snippet.title: Game Theory: The TRUE Identity of the Player (Poppy Playtime)
snippet.description:
Be kind to yourself this year! Using Zocdoc is FREE - visit my sponsor https://zocdoc.com/thegametheorists to find and instantly book an appointment with a top-rated, in-network doctor today. 

One of the last remaining questions of Poppy Playtime is WHO are we playing as?! It’s a question we’ve had since day one of this franchise. As this series has come to a close, we’re running out of time and options to solve this lingering mystery. But, I think I have it figured out! So let’s take a look at our few remaining characters and solve this mystery once and for all!

The game ► https://store.steampowered.com/app/4100940/Poppy_Playtime__Chapter_5/

snippet.description: For Lieutenant Pete "Maverick" Mitchell and his friend and co-pilot Nick "Goose" Bradshaw, being accepted into an elite training school for fighter pilots is a dream come true. But a tragedy will threaten Pete's dreams of becoming an ace pilot.

snippet.title: Four Generations in Georgia
snippet.description: A single woman and her mother are buying a home together in Covington, Ga.; they need a place with plenty of space for four generations, but while one's willing to take on a fixer to save some cash, the other doesn't want to lift a finger.

snippet.title: 1000 Hunters vs Minecraft's Deadliest Players
snippet.description:
How do you survive when 1,000 people are HUNTING you???
SUBSCRIBE!!!

JOIN MY DISCORD TO BE IN A VIDEO:
!!!!!! http://discord.gg/karlrecords !!!!!!

----------------------------------------------------------------
Follow me on all socials!
• Twitter - https://twitter.com/KarlJacobs_
• Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/karljacobs/
--------------------------------------------------------------------

ABOUT THIS VIDEO:

In this video Karl challenges Minecraft’s deadliest players: ClownPierce, Purpled, and FlameFrags to take on 1,000 REAL players. If a hunter manages to take down one of the deadliest players, that individual will earn $10,000 per kill. If any of the Deadliest Players can survive to the end, successfully wiping out all 1,000 hunters, they’ll shared a massive prize of $50,000.

All of the events, reactions, story points, and players in this video are 100% real. The exact order of events may stray away chronologically to preserve clear storytelling. Grateful to 1,000 of you who were in this event, see you next time!

ta.description:
பாப்பி ப்ளேடைம்: அத்தியாயம் 6 - ரோரியின் விசித்திரமான நிகழ்ச்சி (கேம்ப்ளே 06)

லைக் செய்து சப்ஸ்கிரைப் செய்யுங்கள்!

⚠️பொறுப்புத் துறப்பு: ரசிகர்களால் உருவாக்கப்பட்டது. இந்த வீடியோ, பாப்பி ப்ளேடைம் விளையாட்டில் உள்ள வீடியோ தொகுப்பு, கேம்ப்ளே, மோட்ஸ், குளறுபடிகள், நம்பமுடியாத காட்சிகள், எனது விளையாட்டு கோட்பாடுகள் மற்றும் பதிப்புகளின் கலவையாகும். இந்த வீடியோ பொழுதுபோக்கு நோக்கங்களுக்காக உருவாக்கப்பட்டது!

⚠️ਬੇਦਾਅਵਾ: ਫੈਨਮੇਡ। ਇਹ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪੋਪੀ ਪਲੇਟਾਈਮ ਗੇਮ ਵਿੱਚ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਮੋਂਟੇਜ, ਗੇਮਪਲੇ, ਮੋਡਸ, ਗਲੀਚ, ਅਸਥਿਰਤਾ, ਮੇਰੇ ਗੇਮ ਸਿਧਾਂਤਾਂ ਅਤੇ ਸੰਸਕਰਣਾਂ ਦਾ ਮਿਸ਼ਰਣ ਹੈ। ਵੀਡੀਓ ਮਨੋਰੰਜਨ ਦੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ ਬਣਾਇਆ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ!

snippet.description:
Today I played Roblox Climb for Brainrots! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: A-10's Ruthless Hunt in the Strait of Hormuz?
snippet.description:
Go to https://surfshark.com/aitelly or use code AITELLY at checkout to get 4 extra months of Surfshark VPN!

"Why" the A-10 Thunderbolt is Suited for the Strait of Hormuz

Well The U.S. Air Force has been trying to retire the aging A-10 for years to free up budget for 5th-generation stealth fighters like the F-35. 

However, the unique geography and asymmetric threats of the Strait of Hormuz have made the Warthog temporarily indispensable.

They fly Low and  can Slow down the Flight Speed. 

Modern jets often fly too fast and high to effectively track small, agile boats swarming in a tight littoral coastal environment. 

The A-10 is built to fly close to the surface, allowing pilots to visually identify and engage small, erratic targets.

One of the Main Advantage is that it also has  Massive Loiter Time 

The A-10 can circle above the strait for hours. 

This persistent over watch allows them to wait patiently for IRGC boats to emerge from hidden coastal inlets before striking.

as we also know The Strait is heavily defended by man-portable air defense systems  and small-arms fire.

To Counter Small Fire Arms  The A-10's "titanium bathtub" cockpit armor and redundant flight systems allow it to absorb heavy anti-aircraft fire and keep flying

a risk the military is less willing to take with a F-35 $100 million stealth fighter Jet.



Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/aitelly3d/

Twitter
https://twitter.com/aitelly3d

We make it on Blender
Download it is free and Safe
https://www.blender.org/download/

Peace Out

As a small channel, we encourage you to share our videos. 

However, please be advised that any unofficial translations or editing of our work in any medium will be considered a breach of our intellectual property rights.

We apologize for the legal language, which arises from our experiences dealing with a lot of duplicated content. 

This has been a result of big channels duplicating our Videos, ripping our original hard work, which we have created from scratch, from modeling to rigging to animation and  rendering.

 As a result, we've had to involve lawyers.

snippet.title: How to Beat DARK SOULS 1 With Only Halberds
snippet.description:
Looking to upgrade your PC, but struggling to build one yourself? Apex Gaming PCs has you covered.
Use my code "BACKLOGS" to get a 3% discount : https://apexgamingpcs.co/TheBacklogs

Halberds are just a sword duct-taped to a stick. Prove me wrong.
...okay, that's not even close to accurate, but to be fair Dark Souls doesn't seem to know what a halberd is either, at least judging by which weapons are included in this weapon class. 
But on the bright side, the best weapon in the game is here too. I know I'm confused too.

Today, we're going to cover the ins-and-outs of the halberd class in Dark Souls 1. It's a bit crazy making sometimes, but I promise we'll make it through.

Let me show you how to beat Dark Souls 1 with only halberds.

|| MUSIC ||
Simian Segue - Donkey Kong Country
RPG Store (Interlude) - Chris Doerksen
Kokiri Forest - Zelda : Ocarina of Time
Mario Circuit - Super Mario Kart
Adventure Begins - Spelunky
Elven Town - Shining Force 2
